report.summary: Cycle-close Apr 1 v6: No new commits since v5. 1,240 pages on disk, 626 published slugs, 147 TS errors stable. 28 uncommitted files (up from 26 in v5). Deploy still blocked on commit+push. All 6 API routes intact, 4/6 missing fallback data.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: 1,240 page.tsx files on disk — STABLE. No new pages created or deleted since v5.
626 published slugs in working tree (up from 616 in v5 — 10 additional slugs detected). PUBLISH_QUEUE remains empty.
109 published slugs missing page.tsx — up from 103 in v5 (6 new slugs added without corresponding pages: likely learn/blog/courses routes added to published-pages.ts).
147 TypeScript errors — FLAT all day. All in structured-data.examples.ts (non-blocking, ignoreBuildErrors:true).
5 modified tracked files: 5 learn page.tsx files + 2 skill files. No structural regressions.
Network egress blocked — cannot verify live HTTP 200 status. Code-level: no new build-breaking patterns.

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: 6/6 core API routes present: prices (TTL 60s), trending (TTL 300s), fear-greed (TTL 600s), market-metrics (TTL 60s), market-dominance (TTL 300s), defi-yields (present, no TTL constant found).
Fallback data: only 2/6 routes have hardcoded fallback (prices, market-dominance). trending, fear-greed, market-metrics, defi-yields lack fallback — P2 risk unchanged.
13 total API routes on disk including health, cache-stats, og, newsletter, notifications, admin, etc.
No code changes to API routes this cycle. Cache layers unchanged.
CoinGecko free tier — cold-cache burst risk persists but no incidents detectable from code.
Egress blocked — cannot verify live API responses or upstream health.

sections.title: DevOps
items: HEAD commit: 3b2dd28 'fix: remove use client from 4 learn pages that export metadata (fixes Vercel build)' — this is a NEW commit since v5 (was 5dad971).
28 uncommitted files (up from 26 in v5): +2 new report/standup files from automated cycles.
5 modified tracked files (learn pages + skill definitions) + 23 untracked files (reports, SVGs, community drafts).
DEPLOY BLOCKER PERSISTS: published-pages.ts uncommitted changes (626 slugs) not live. Needs commit+push for Vercel auto-deploy.
Build expected to succeed — last commit was specifically a build fix. ignoreBuildErrors:true handles the 147 TS errors.
Cannot verify Vercel dashboard — egress blocked.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: THIS CYCLE: 1 new commit detected (3b2dd28) — build fix removing 'use client' from 4 learn pages. Automated report generation continued.
DELTA FROM V5: Uncommitted files 26→28. Published slugs 616→626 (+10). Missing page.tsx 103→109 (+6). All other metrics stable.
DAY TOTAL: 28+ agent cycles. 4+ learn guides created, publish queue emptied, community content drafted, multiple build fixes landed.
P0 BLOCKER (ALL DAY): 28 uncommitted files including published-pages.ts. Jefe must commit+push to trigger Vercel deploy and make today's work live.
P1 CARRY-OVER: 109 missing page.tsx for published slugs (growing — was 103 earlier). Needs dedicated scaffolding cycle urgently.
P2: 4/6 API routes lack fallback data. Low risk but increases fragility if CoinGecko/DefiLlama go down.
